request_payload.exposure_text: As we get older, we all want to feel safe and secure. That's why it's crucial we don't let our national security be compromised by reckless policies. Strategic autonomy sounds good in theory, but in practice, it could leave us vulnerable. Look at what happened in [European Country]: they tried to go it alone, and now they're struggling to keep up with emerging threats. We need strong alliances and proven deterrence strategies. Our safety can't be an experiment. #NationalSecurityFirst #AllianceStrength
